requirements_text: The system must support role-based access control with at least three levels: admin, reviewer, and viewer. All data at rest must be encrypted using AES-256. The system should integrate with an existing LDAP directory for authentication. Reports must be exportable in PDF and CSV formats. Response time for search queries should be under 2 seconds for datasets up to 1 million records. The UI must be accessible and comply with WCAG 2.1 AA standards. An audit trail must capture all user actions with timestamps.
context: Enterprise compliance management platform for a federal agency. Zero-trust environment, FedRAMP Moderate target, no unrestricted internet egress from production.

artifacts.name: SOW-2026-014 Compliance Platform Modernization
artifacts.content: Modernize the legacy compliance tracker to support 10,000 concurrent users across 14 bureaus. Delivery must align with Authority to Operate (ATO) in under 9 months.

artifacts.name: CONOPS v1.2
artifacts.content: Reviewers triage incoming artifacts, route them to subject-matter experts, and produce signed compliance attestations. Admins manage users and retention policy.

artifacts.name: CMP-412 SSO via agency LDAP
artifacts.content: As a reviewer I want single sign-on via the agency LDAP so I do not manage a separate password.

artifacts.name: ICD-ARTIFACT-INGEST
artifacts.content: Upstream artifact service publishes JSON documents to an internal SFTP drop. Polling interval 5 minutes, max payload 25 MB.

artifacts.name: legacy_exporter.py
artifacts.content: def export_csv(rows): with open('/tmp/out.csv','w') as f: for r in rows: f.write(','.join(r)+'\n')

artifacts.name: RB-INCIDENT-P2
artifacts.content: On P2 incident: page on-call, snapshot audit log, open ServiceNow ticket, notify ISSO within 1 hour.
